content:
# Ricker Wavelet

**Summary**: A common wavelet shape used in seismic processing for pulse modeling.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009]] used a Ricker wavelet to model and subtract diffracted energy.

## Scientific Context

- [[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009]] Used to model the expected signal of a diffracted wave.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods



## Key Findings Across Sources

- The attenuation algorithm is based on the least mean square best-fit of Ricker wavelet. ([[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009, p. 10]])
